dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I cough. Hard to get air. Four days now.
To understand your cough and breathing issues better, can you describe the onset, severity, and any specific triggers that make the breathing harder?
Chest hurt. Five. Very bad. I... I don't know where I am. Why am I here?
Do you have any known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors?
What? I... I don't know. Maybe? I not sure.
[DDX] (Pneumonia; Pulmonary Embolism; Congestive Heart Failure; Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease exacerbation; Myocardial Infarction)
